phrases.en: Dan got home tired after a long day at work.
phrases.zh: 上了一整天班，丹拖着疲惫的身子回到了家。

phrases.en: He went straight into his bedroom.
He loosened his tie and pulled it off.
phrases.zh: 他松开领带，把它摘了下来。

phrases.en: Then, he unbuttoned his stiff dress shirt.
phrases.zh: 然后，他解开了那件硬挺的衬衫。

phrases.en: He took off his work clothes carefully.
phrases.zh: 他小心地脱下了工作时穿的衣服。

phrases.en: He pulled on a soft pair of loungewear.
phrases.zh: 他套上了一套柔软的家居服。

phrases.en: The cotton fabric felt warm and cozy.
phrases.zh: 棉质的布料摸起来又暖和又舒服。

phrases.en: He smoothed the wrinkles out of his shirt.
phrases.zh: 他把衬衫上的褶皱抚平。

phrases.en: He hung the outfit up neatly in the closet.
phrases.zh: 他把那身衣服整齐地挂进了衣柜。

phrases.en: He dropped his dirty socks into the laundry basket.
phrases.zh: 他把脏袜子扔进了洗衣篮。

phrases.en: Then, he slid his bare feet into warm slippers.
phrases.zh: 然后，他把光脚伸进了温暖的拖鞋里。

phrases.en: Finally, he felt relaxed and ready to unwind.
phrases.zh: 终于，他感到放松，准备好好歇一歇了。
